text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm heading over to the track for<n>some
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: One... Two... And step!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This won't do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I think you're doing just fine. You're<n>still not
satisfied?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My legs are lagging behind on the<n>beat. Perhaps
I've been paying too<n>much attention to my upper
body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I need to start over with the basics.<n>Please come
watch again in a few<n>days.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Next, I would like you to observe my<n>running form.
All right, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute! What do you mean<n>you want me to
observe your form?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, what did you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what to say. You were...<n>normal, I
guess?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. I take it you mean there were<n>no issues with
my form.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Moving on, I'd like you to comment<n>on my
conduct and posture when I<n>study. After that will
be my culinary<n>abilities...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on a second! Studying and<n>culinary what
now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I've agreed to an<n>in-depth
special feature for a<n>magazine...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was told they were going to report<n>on my daily
routine along with my<n>running and dancing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If there are readers looking forward<n>to this special,
it wouldn't be fair of<n>me to disappoint them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right... So that's why you're asking<n>me to do all
of this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But if I were one of the readers, I<n>don't think I'd
necessarily want to<n>see you pulling off everything
flawlessly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying that your own<n>expectations are
different from<n>everyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't having "expectations"<n>mean that they
like you? Nobody's<n>going to be disappointed just
because they see you struggling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What I think the readers are looking<n>forward to
seeing is the real you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The... real me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, after listening to you, I feel like<n>all my
pent-up anxiety has melted<n>away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll show everyone the real<n>me, like you
said.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's more like it. Being relaxed<n>is the best
approach. Just like when<n>you're stuffing your
face at a dessert<n>buffet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I-I would never dream of exposing<n>that side of me!
